name: Bread & Circuses
effect_text: Gain 2 Coins.

name: Favor of Mars
effect_text: Draw 3 cards.

name: Gladiator's Boast
effect_text: Draw 1 card.

name: Patron's Donation
effect_text: Gain 3 Coins.

name: Slave Revolt
effect_text: You may destroy a card from your hand or discard pile.

name: Military Tribute
effect_text: Gain a Legion card costing 5 or less.

name: Senate Decree
effect_text: Gain a Senate card costing 5 or less.

name: Ludus Recruitment
effect_text: Gain a Ludus card costing 5 or less.

name: Hidden Stash
effect_text: Gain 2 Coins and draw 1 card.

name: Oracle's Warning
effect_text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck and reorder them.

name: Veteran's Advice
effect_text: Draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card.

name: Spoils of Victory
effect_text: Look at each opponent's hand and choose a card to destroy.

name: Imperial Tax
effect_text: All opponents discard a card.

name: Arena Wager
effect_text: Select a card your own in play or from hand, then select a random card from each opponent's hand and reveal them all. The highest total valor + cost + victory points wins. Winner gains 1 Gratia per player in the wager, the others gain 1 disfavor.

name: Merchant Caravan
effect_text: Gain 4 Coins.

name: Triumphal Parade
effect_text: Gain 1 Gratia.

name: Temple Blessing
effect_text: Gain 1 Gratia and Draw 1 Card.

name: Black Market Deal
effect_text: Gain a card costing 5 or less, then discard a card.

name: Gladiator's Funeral
effect_text: Destroy 1 of your cards in play or from hand, Gain a card from the Market or Epics costing up to 2 more.

name: Crowd Frenzy
effect_text: Destroy the top card of each players deck. You pick a new card costing the same as the destroyed card for each player, if one is available.
